title: Huawei AP572 - WiFi7 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna
description: The Huawei eKitEngine AP572 is a modern indoor access point (AP) that delivers ultra-high speed and stability thanks to the latest Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) technology. This access point is an ideal choice for businesses, hotels, schools, or retail environments where fast and seamless connectivity is essentialâeven in high-density networks. It features two Ethernet ports: one 100/1000M/2.5G port with 802.3at PoE support and one 10/100/1000M port, as well as a USB port With support for 160 MHz channel width , 4096-QAM modulation , and advanced MU-MIMO , the AP572 reaches a total transmission rate of up to 6.45 Gbps , enabling near-instant file transfers. It delivers up to 0.69 Gbps on the 2.4 GHz band and 5.76 Gbps on the 5 GHz band. This makes it capable of handling a large number of simultaneous connectionsâ maximum number of connected STAs is 1024, in high-density scenarios recommended for up to 160 clients Its elegant round design (220 mm diameter) and flexible mounting options (wall, ceiling, or rail) ensure seamless integration into any interior. The durable metal bracket guarantees long-lasting and stable installation. AP572 is perfect for use in office spaces, classrooms, and public areas with high foot traffic Device management can be performed locally via EasyWeb or a WAC controller , or remotely through HUAWEI eKit App and the SME Network Center . It also supports quick deployment via Wi-Fi or barcode scanningâideal for both installation partners and end users With intelligent calibration, smart antenna technology, and advanced security encryption ( WPA3, WPA2,…
